top_findings.summary: The skill description specifies that it will automatically install GitHub CLI (gh) with sudo/administrative privileges when missing. While GitHub CLI is necessary for the skill's core functionality, requiring automatic system-level software installation with elevated privileges represents permission overreach. A project management skill should guide users to install prerequisites manually or check for their presence without performing automatic system modifications that require root/admin access. This action extends beyond the stated purpose of "creating and managing project boards" into system administration territory.
